title: dendrolirium ferrugineum var. assamicum
intro: Dendrolirium ferrugineum var. assamicum, also known as the Assam Dendrolirium, is a plant species belonging to the family Asphodelaceae, which is native to the northeastern regions of India. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The Assam Dendrolirium is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function.
